overall.description: A ship simulation game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge during nighttime navigation. The ship moves steadily through calm waters while electronic navigation displays show radar, GPS charts, and depth soundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open coastal waters at night

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation displays while maintaining course through calm open waters

entered.detail: leftmost monitor showing electronic chart with coastline and vessel position
center monitor displaying rotating radar sweep with range rings
rightmost monitor showing depth sounder profile and water depth
forward deck of the ship visible through the bridge windows with red navigation lights
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge wing
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge wing
dark calm water surrounding the vessel

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady first-person view from a ship's bridge at night, with three navigation monitors displaying GPS, radar, and depth data. The vessel cruises through calm open waters, with the bow visible ahead and bridge railings framing the view on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge approaching channel marker in coastal waters

events.description: white channel marker pole becomes visible on the starboard side, indicating approach to a navigation channel

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the vessel as it approaches a navigation marker, maintaining course while monitoring the new visual reference

entered.detail: white vertical navigation marker pole rising from the water on the starboard side

segments.scene_description: As the ship continues forward, a white channel marker pole enters the frame from the right, indicating the vessel is approaching a defined navigation channel. The bridge instruments remain visible while the marker moves from the far right to mid-right position as the ship passes by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it transitions from open nighttime waters into a marked navigation channel. It begins with a view of the vessel cruising through calm darkness, framed by bridge railings and three glowing monitors displaying GPS, radar, and depth data. As the ship maintains its forward momentum, the open horizon begins to shift with the appearance of a white channel marker pole entering the frame from the right. The scene then evolves as the vessel passes the marker, which glides from the far right toward the center of the view while the bridge instruments continue to illuminate the interior.
